maintainer_decision.reviewer_role: repository maintainer, semantic owner, and assurance-evidence reviewer
maintainer_decision.decision_recording: explicit maintainer decision summarized without committing a private chat transcript
approved_semantics: every v1 policy-bound resource quantity must be positive
LifecycleNonFungible policy candidates must have quantity_max exactly one
the RFC-0003 deterministic rejection precedence is normative
the reviewed pre-authority API quarantine, typed resource-ID boundary, and diagnostic redaction remain required

remaining_obligations: apply the accepted predicate only after authenticated active-policy resolution in final ResourceV1 construction
define any zero-quantity marker permission through a future versioned RFC
implement canonical policy bytes, activation, registry authority, state, and commit separately
non_claims: approval does not create canonical policy bytes or authenticated policy activation
approval does not create a governed verifier registry or verified fact
approval does not establish final ResourceV1, state, persistence, or atomic commit
approval does not establish release or production authority
